## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] Ran `make lint` locally and all checks pass
- [ ] Ran `make test` locally and integration tests pass
- [ ] Followed [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed (README, SECURITY.md, etc.)
- [ ] Respects the [stable contract with salt-netapi-client](README.md#compatibility-with-salt-netapi-client)
